reach_why: Extends familiar RSI skepticism and evaluator-bias concerns; does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links critic stability, phase-transition thresholds, and ontological bias into one bottleneck argument.
falsifiable_why: Testable if operationalized: define stability, threshold parameter, and novelty-vs-nonsense discrimination performance.
explanation: RSI needs a critic more stable than generation and less biased toward familiar explanatory forms.
